title: Generate a changelog from commit and PR history
description: Assemble a user-facing changelog by grouping merged changes since the last tag into added/changed/fixed/breaking sections with provenance.
body: Use when preparing release notes for a new version. Actions: list commits/PRs since the previous tag, group them by type (added, changed, fixed, breaking, security), rewrite each into user-impact language rather than raw commit subjects, and link each entry to its PR/commit SHA for provenance. Surface breaking changes and migration notes at the top. Do not present the raw git log as a changelog or omit breaking changes. This skill exposes capability only and must not publish or tag without runtime permission. Validation signals include every entry tracing to a merged change and a breaking-changes section that matches the semver bump. Risk boundary: if breaking changes are detected but the proposed version is only a patch/minor, flag the mismatch for human review rather than publishing.
